ai_summary: Elon Musk announced Starlink's expansion to Gibraltar, demonstrating the company's geographic growth strategy and market penetration beyond traditional coverage areas. This represents a business milestone in Starlink's mission to provide global satellite internet connectivity, expanding the addressable market and execution on its international expansion roadmap.
embed_html:
Starlink in Gibraltar! 🇬🇮 https://t.co/Z2EKgoHZ5J

ai_summary: xAI announced the release of Grok 4.3, achieving a score of 53 on the Artificial Analysis Intelligence Index with significant improvements including ~40% lower input pricing and ~60% lower output pricing compared to the previous version (Grok 4.20), positioning it competitively above Claude Sonnet 4.6. Elon Musk's one-word reply 'Progress' underscores xAI's iterative advancement in AI model performance and cost efficiency, demonstrating the company's strategy to improve both capability and pricing competitiveness in the large language model market.
embed_html:
Progress

— Elon Musk (@elonmusk) May 1, 2026

parent.text: Reality is the greatest teacher model. That is why Full Self-Driving is immensely powerful, as it is grounded in the real world.
parent.name: Yun-Ta Tsai
parent.embed_html:
Reality is the greatest teacher model. That is why Full Self-Driving is immensely powerful, as it is grounded in the real world.

— Yun-Ta Tsai (@yunta_tsai) May 1, 2026

ai_summary: The thread discusses Tesla's Full Self-Driving (FSD) development philosophy, with the key insight that real-world data and testing ('reality') is the most effective training mechanism for autonomous driving AI models. This reflects Tesla's practical approach to machine learning—using actual driving scenarios to continuously improve FSD rather than relying solely on simulated or theoretical training data.
embed_html:
🎯

— Elon Musk (@elonmusk) May 1, 2026
